channel.title: Engine on ljf12825

item.title: Addressables

item.description: The usage, document and principle of Animation System. Include every Animation components and params in Unity.

item.title: Assets Import and Load
item.description: Unity assets and resources management system(Resources folder, Asset Bundles and Addressables)

item.title: Attribute in Unity
item.description: The usage and principles of common Attributes in Unity and C#

item.description: The usage, document and principle of Audio System. Include every Audio components and params in Unity.

item.title: Behaviour Designer

item.title: Behaviour Tree
item.description: The Introduction of behaviour tree in unity. Explanation and implementation examples of behavior tree structure

item.title: Burst Complier
item.description: How burst works in Unity and how to use it.

item.title: C# in Unity
item.description: The Range of C# in Unity Game Development

item.title: Character Controller
item.description: Introduction of Character Controller in Unity. Usage of Character Controller. Implement of Character Controller.

item.title: Collider & Trigger
item.description: Collider’s core functions, categories, Inspector panel parameters, code API, alignment methods, and Trigger application scenarios in Unity

item.description: All builldin Component in Unity
